title: Planet 8-bit Enhanced Vanilla Pack
description: This Modpack was made for the Minecraft Server, Planet 8-bit. Anyone looking for the criteria this pack covers is welcome to use it!
body:
This modpack was put together with the intention of being a Vanilla+/enhanced experience in survival mode. There's new biomes and structures added to every dimension to enhance your experience with a renewed sense of adventure. BSL Shaders, Dramatic Skies, and a number of aesthetic mods and resource packs give the game a fresh new (and honestly stunning) look.

There are also a number of quality of life and building additions. New building pieces, ways to store experience, and a disenchanting table make things a little nicer and smoother without disrupting the naturtal progression of the game. Storage Drawers, dyeable chests and cute backpacks make storage in and out of your base more fun and easy to manage.

If you're looking for a way to play the classic game we all love with new twist, this is the right pack for you! I'll continue to add mods that further enhance this purpose as I come across them. Thanks for checking it out, and have fun out there!

**I did not create any mod that is in this pack, I only put them together. Full credit belongs to each mod author with all rights reserved.**
